caption:
...And then there were 3 🖤🤍 

It's been almost a week since Jetta succumbed to her battle with Lymphoma and it's been the hardest week of all our lives.  She has left a void that is much larger than we ever would have imagined.  Her big personality no longer filling the house brings constant tears and overwhelming waves of grief.  But it brings us peace knowing that we did everything we could for her.  We all cherished every second of our 16 months together since her diagnosis and truly made every second count!

The 5 of us will eventually adjust but our pack leader will always be our Jetta/Jetta Bear/Jetta Wetta 🤍🖤

I’m so so sorry. There are honestly no words. Know that you did all that you possibly could, and you gave her the best life ❤️ adjusting to life without them is the toughest thing to do but it does get a little easier as time moves on. She’s always with you and your pack, wherever you go. 🐶 sending you so much love xo
😢 So sorry for all of you 🌈❤️

caption:
Where do you want to go?

We were in a room with Barbara Corcoran, Dean Graziosi, and Vic Keller at Squad Up Summit — and every single speaker circled back to the same themes.

Get clear on what you want. Stop playing small. Embrace AI or get left behind. And have the courage to actually do something with the potential you know you have.

Here's the thing — we didn't go to Denver to learn how to start. We went because we're already building and we refuse to slow down.

Ryan flies medevac. I'm a nurse. We're building Solnest alongside careers that demand everything from us — because we love hospitality and we believe STR management can be done at a completely different level.

Denver just compressed the timeline.

Most STR managers are still doing this manually. And their owners are paying for it — whether they know it or not.

We've been quietly building AI into how we run Solnest — market analysis, pricing, guest communication. The stuff that used to take hours running automatically in the background.

We got home from the Summit last night. Within an hour Ryan had built a full revenue management agent from scratch.

Honestly? With AI we're just keeping up. That's the reality of how fast this is moving. And if that's where we are — imagine where most managers are.

We're coming home with bigger goals and a shorter timeline to hit them. We are going all in on this — and the demand is already there.

If your property is being managed by someone who isn't thinking about any of this — that's worth thinking about.
